title: Lyyt | Bright Camping Light for Tents or Sheltered Garden Use | Rechargeable, Foldable LED Lamp with Different Modes of Lighting: high, Medium and Flashing

description: From the manufacturer Lyyt | Bright Camping Light for Tents or Sheltered Garden Use | Rechargeable, Foldable LED Lamp with Different Modes of Lighting: high, medium and flashing This Foldable LED Lamp is an essential tool for camping enthusiasts, or temporary outdoor lighting solution. It features three adjustable illuminated blades with high, medium, and flashing light modes, ensuring optimal lighting for any scenario. This lamp is easily rechargeable via its USB C port, making it very convenient. Weighing just 155 grams and measuring 125x70x70mm, its lightweight, compact, and foldable design makes it perfect for camping, hiking, or emergency use. The built-in hook allows for easy hanging in tents or shelters. Powered by two 1200mAh batteries, it offers long-lasting illumination wherever you need it.
